raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current scope","name":"What's feeling most solid in your role right now, Ahmed?","description":"Surfaces the parts of his current scope that are stable before moving into stretch or change.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tactical pull","name":"Where are you getting pulled back into execution most often?","description":"Makes the tactical-vs-strategic split concrete without assuming it is a problem.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-level scope","name":"What does senior scope mean to you in practice?","description":"Asks him to define the next-level role in concrete terms rather than abstract ambition.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Role markers","name":"What would make it obvious to you that you're operating at the next level?","description":"Gets specific signals, outcomes, and behaviors that define the destination.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence gaps","name":"Where do stakeholder conversations still not land the way you want?","description":"Surfaces trust and influence gaps in a concrete work setting.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility pattern","name":"What part of your visibility feels least consistent right now?","description":"Explores whether the issue is exposure, messaging, or follow-through without diagnosing it upfront.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trade-offs ahead","name":"What are you choosing not to own over the next six to twelve weeks?","description":"Forces a real prioritisation conversation around strategic ownership and trade-offs.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager support","name":"What kind of support from me would help you stay at the strategic level?","description":"Opens the manager's role in protecting focus and reinforcing the growth path.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"First move","name":"Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into one concrete next move.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
